summary: Claude Code now has a bounded managed install/check lane that writes and verifies a Claude settings + hook surface, but it still does not become the Codex official runtime or full platform-parity lane.

repo_provided: settings.json managed Claude PreToolUse hook entry
host_managed: broader Claude host behavior outside the managed vibeskills + write-guard surface
notes: The repo preserves existing Claude settings while merging a bounded managed surface.
Do not market this as Codex-equivalent official-runtime ownership or full platform parity.

anti_overclaim: Supported-with-constraints still means host-managed plugins, MCP, credentials, and broader Claude behavior remain outside repo ownership.
Claude Code is not claimed to be platform-parity with Codex or an official-runtime lane in this repository.
